hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Professional plumber in uniform working on a water heater in a residential basement, tool belt visible, clean work environment, photorealistic, no brand logos, no text.
hero.caption_context: 24/7 + professional is the brand. Hero should show a plumber looking sharp, not in-the-middle-of-a-mess. If Bruce surfaces a Jeremiah photo, that's ideal.

gallery.context: Tank or tankless water heater install — specialty. Caption 'Water heaters — standard + tankless'.
Drain cleaning / snake / hydro-jet. Caption 'Drains — snaked clean, cameras when needed'.
Repipe job — copper or PEX runs visible. Caption 'Repiping — whole house, not patched'.
Leak detection equipment or finished repair. Caption 'Leaks — found first, fixed right'.
Commercial job — restaurant, office, multi-family. Caption 'Commercial — same truck, same team'.
Plumber Jeremiah (named in search snippet) or team. Caption names Jeremiah if identifiable.

sections.context: North Atlanta residential corridor; Unsplash OK

notes: Plumbing vertical = professionalism-focused imagery. Tankless water heater is a high-growth specialty — gallery slot 1 should feature it. Repiping is the high-ticket differentiator — slot 3 should show whole-house scale. 24/7 brand is supported by copy, not photo.
